title: Accurate Creation Log for Form Submissions (QR Code)
excerpt:
Hi, 
I see that there is a previous request about this but it is closed. So I thought I could bring this up again. I have a Workform for both internal company members and external clients to use to communicate issues wit…

posts.author: lou.es (Lou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I see that there is a previous request about this but it is closed. So I thought I could bring this up again. I have a Workform for both internal company members and external clients to use to communicate issues with us.

We are sharing this form through a QR code. And unfortunately, after the form is filled, the creation log column automatically sets it to me, regardless of who filled the form. This is a shame because it defeats the purpose of this column.

I saw that in order for the form to show the proper creation log the user has to be logged in and subscribed to the board. This works for our team members with a computer but not with the QR code through their phone even though they have the Monday app and are logged in.

Hence, I would like it to be possible that while using the QR code, the creation log doesn’t automatically assign me. Instead, it recognizes a user through the Monday app and if it is a non-Monday user it just sets the creation log to “Unknown”.

This is very important, without it the form because much less interesting to use.

posts.author: DocCreate (FlowTech Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
QR Trax can help clear your loggin issue through our eform integration. It helps teams capture structured data, verify site activity, and automatically update boards the moment a QR code is scanned.

Key Features

Create Branded QR Codes at Scale
Generate unlimited custom QR codes tied to items, assets, locations, or workflows.

Custom eForms Linked to Each QR Code
Attach fully customized scan forms to capture structured inputs such as status updates, notes, dropdown selections, photos, and files — all mapped directly to monday columns and subitems.

GPS & Address Capture for Verified Scans
Every scan records geo location, timestamp, and street address to create reliable audit trails for inspections, field visits, compliance tracking, and asset verification.

Automatic Board Updates & Subitem Creation
Scanning a code can instantly create records, update item status, log activity history, and trigger automations.

Photo & File Upload from the Field
Capture visual proof and documentation during scans using any mobile device.

Real-Time Scan Tracking & History
Search, audit, and export scan data to maintain operational transparency and reporting accuracy.

Mobile-Friendly Field Workflows
Designed for teams working across sites, facilities, and distributed locations.

Common Use Cases

Teams are using QR Trax for:

  • Asset and equipment tracking

  • Property and facility inspections

  • Field service visit verification

  • Maintenance workflows and work orders

  • Construction site activity logs

  • Inventory tracking

  • Event and visitor check-ins

QR Trax is built for operational environments including property management, construction, logistics, facilities, and field services.

If you’re looking to connect real-world activity directly to your monday boards, QR Trax can help streamline your workflows.

We’d love feedback from the community and are happy to support new implementations.

— The FlowTech Team
